name: Dockge
short_description: Elegant Docker Compose management UI for creating and managing stacks interactively.
description: Dockge is a Docker Compose-focused management UI offering a visual editor with syntax highlighting, one-click stack deployment, and service controls (start/stop/restart, logs, shell). It simplifies managing compose-based projects with a clean, user-friendly interface.
usecases: Create and edit docker-compose.yml files with a visual editor.
Manage your compose stacks - start, stop, restart services.
View logs and access containers directly from the UI.
Organize multiple compose projects in one place.
notes: Stores compose files in configurable directory
Stack traces from failed deployments shown clearly
